mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS video_files ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, creation_date DATETIME, modification_date DATETIME, last_access_time DATETIME, file_format VARCHAR(20), file_size BIGINT, file_size_format VARCHAR(32), file_score float(3,1), file_md5 VARCHAR(32), file_path VARCHAR(512) UNIQUE, actor VARCHAR(255), video_code VARCHAR(100), create_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_files ( file_name, creation_date, modification_date, last_access_time, file_format, file_size, file_size_format, file_score, file_md5, file_path, actor, video_code ) VALUES ( #{fileName}, #{creationDate}, #{modificationDate}, #{lastAccessTime}, #{fileFormat}, #{fileSize},#{item.fileSizeFormat}, #{item.fileScore}, #{fileMd5}, #{filePath}, #{actor}, #{videoCode} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE file_name = VALUES(file_name), creation_date = VALUES(creation_date), modification_date = VALUES(modification_date), last_access_time = VALUES(last_access_time), file_format = VALUES(file_format), file_size = VALUES(file_size), file_md5 = VALUES(file_md5), actor = VALUES(actor), video_code = VALUES(video_code);
